change.title: GitHub-shaped PR fixture
change.description: A GitHub PR-shaped fixture that still runs through the source-agnostic core.
change.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
 # Cerberus

context.summary: GitHub-shaped input without GitHub runtime dependency.
acceptance: GitHub source metadata is optional context, not the engine ontology.
